company: ST Engineering Training & Simulation Pte Ltd
desc: Developed a web system for real-time monitoring and management of servers, workstations, and embedded devices. Collaborated with engineers to integrate real-time data collection, networking, and system reliability measures. Demonstrated company products to both local and international clients.

Involved in on-site projects and collaborated on the deployment of network systems. Set up and troubleshoot network devices. Partnered with various vendors such as UOB, Raffles Medical Group and M1 to deploy public network systems.

Oversee live production for sunday church services and adhoc events to make sure the production runs smoothly and in sync. Produnction inscludes camera shots, sound engineering, and graphics projections
